scope: no-training exact weighted least-squares audit of the active affine coordinate readout on the same nested 1/4/16/64 fixed states; no production, path, optimizer, tensor or later-Gate change

readout.graph_weighting: each graph contributes mean node squared error

decision_rule.all_pass: the random frozen representation supports a one-shot training-only quotient readout calibration proposal
decision_rule.small_pass_large_fail: the affine basis is locally complete but does not span many states with fixed features; use a separately qualified alternating/two-timescale backbone-readout mechanism rather than static calibration
decision_rule.small_fail: the captured affine implementation contradicts the single-state audit; stop and inspect the design extraction
decision_rule.boundary: This no-training audit cannot change production, qualify H1a, initialize a checkpoint, add steps or seeds, or authorize H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
